steps.title: Translate the words to symbols
steps.content: "Twice the value of $x$" means $2x$. "8 more than" a quantity means add 8 to it.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A) $y = 10x + 2$: wrong slope and constant.
  • B) $y = 2x + 8$: matches "twice $x$, plus 8."
  • C) $y = 10x + 8$: slope is 10, not 2.
  • D) $y = 8x + 2$: swaps the roles of 2 and 8.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
